title: AI Tech Website
description: A modern AI-focused technology showcase featuring clean aesthetics and interactive components.
details: This project showcases cutting-edge AI technologies with a focus on performance and minimalist design.

title: 3D Maze Escape
description: An immersive 3D maze escape game built for the web.
details: A first-person perspective maze game featuring procedural generation and spatial sound.

title: FPS Shooter 360
description: Browser-based first-person engine with spatial audio and dynamic lighting.
details: A high-performance FPS engine that runs entirely in the browser using WebGL.

title: IT Project Showcase
description: Comprehensive directory of high-performance engineering projects.
details: A portal designed to aggregate and showcase various IT projects with detailed metrics.

title: NextGen IT Portal
description: A futuristic portal for managing and exploring IT ecosystems.
details: Focuses on infrastructure management and real-time system monitoring.

title: Payment Store
description: Secure and efficient e-commerce payment integration platform.
details: A template for modern e-commerce stores with multi-step payment flows.

title: Reseller Platform
description: Automated commerce ecosystem for resellers and digital products.
details: A platform for managing reseller activities and automated product delivery.

title: Seller Payment Site
description: A dedicated site for sellers to manage payments and transactions.
details: Focuses on transaction transparency and financial reporting for sellers.

title: Tech Terminal
description: Minimalist command-line system for rapid neural path monitoring.
details: A command-line interface tool for system monitoring and rapid automation.

title: Themed Dashboard
description: A highly customizable dashboard with dynamic themes.
details: Demonstrates advanced CSS variable techniques for real-time theme switching.

title: Vite 8 Project
description: Next-gen React application built with Vite 8 and Tailwind CSS.
details: A modern React starter kit optimized for lightning-fast development and deployment.

title: Chat Portfolio
description: Interactive chat-based portfolio showcasing engineering skills.
details: An innovative way to explore a portfolio through a conversational AI interface.

title: Profile Card
description: Premium profile card design with interactive glassmorphism effects.
details: A sleek, modern profile card using advanced CSS techniques like backdrop-filter.

title: Project Showcase Site
description: Advanced multi-page site for showcasing complex engineering portfolios.
details: A fully-featured portfolio site with dynamic project loading and contact forms.
